vulnerabilities.description: The parameter 'id' is vulnerable to error-based SQL injection. DB error 'you have an error in your sql syntax' was reflected in the response.
vulnerabilities.evidence: you have an error in your sql syntax

vulnerabilities.description: Form field 'id' at 'http://localhost/vulnerabilities/sqli/?id=1&Submit=Submit' is vulnerable to SQL injection. DB error 'you have an error in your sql syntax' found in response.
vulnerabilities.evidence: you have an error in your sql syntax
